data.title: Reach Showcases Full-Stack Product Portfolio for AI Vehicle Intelligent Evolution at Auto China 2026
data.description: In Beijing on April 30, 2026, Reach introduced its complete product lineup at Auto China 2026 to drive the advancement of AI-powered vehicles. This unveiling was attended by key figures from top automotive companies like Honda, Toyota, FAW, Geely, among others. The event showcased Reach's comprehensive portfolio aimed at speeding up the intelligent transformation of vehicles.

data.title: New number of votes in AB Volvo
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden on April 30, 2026, the voting power in AB Volvo has been altered by the conversion of 800,000 Series A shares into 800,000 Series B shares. This change was facilitated through a shareholder-supported opportunity for Series A shareholders.

data.title: ADAMA Publishes 2025 ESG Report
data.description: ADAMA Ltd. announces progress towards achieving Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas (GHG) reduction goals. The company, traded as SZSE: 000553, released its 2025 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report. The report indicates an enhanced ESG rating from top agencies. The update was shared from Beijing and Tel Aviv on April 30, 2026.
Company Festi hf. discloses Q1 2026 financial performance.

data.title: Invitation to the presentation of Loomis' Interim Report on May 7, 2026
data.description: Loomis AB is set to release its first quarter 2026 Interim Report on May 7, 2026, at 07:30 a.m. (CEST), with a webcast conference scheduled for 10:00 a.m. (CEST) on the same day. The company will be hosting a press and analyst conference call in STOCKHOLM on April 30, 2026.

data.title: AESC Earns CDP Climate Change A- Rating, Highest Among Global Battery Manufacturers in 2025
data.description: AESC, a renowned player in the electric vehicle and energy storage battery industry, has recently been acknowledged for its commitment to sustainable battery manufacturing. The company proudly revealed that it secured an impressive A- rating for its efforts in combating climate change from CDP. This recognition underscores AESC's leadership role in promoting eco-friendly practices within the sector. The accolade underlines the company's dedication to producing environmentally responsible battery solutions.

data.title: Huahui Health and BeOne Medicines Enter into a Global Exclusive Option, License and Collaboration Agreement for Innovative Oncology Drug HH160
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Huahui Health revealed a significant partnership with BeOne Medicines, signing a global exclusive option, license, and collaboration agreement for HH160, a groundbreaking trispecific antibody used in oncology immunotherapy. This collaboration marks a pivotal moment as BeOne Medicines gains rights to further develop and distribute HH160 worldwide.

data.title: Tether-Owned Twenty One Capital's Shares Surge After Stablecoin Company Proposes Merger With Bitcoin Firm Strike
data.description: The company Tether (USDT), who is the majority owner of Twenty One Capital (XXI) on the NYSE, proposed a three-way merger to boost the strategic outlook of the Bitcoin treasury firm. Tether suggested a merger involving Twenty One Capital and Bitcoin payments firm Strike, followed by a merger with Elektron Energy, a significant Bitcoin mining platform. According to a press release, Tether plans to support this proposed merger. The potential mergers aim to combine entities and capitalize on a strong balance sheet, a profitable operating business on a large scale, and a financial services division focused on driving Bitcoin adoption. If completed, the transactions could create a robust entity poised for success in the crypto market. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Lab Thread introduces Unified Lab Software Platform to streamline biological research
data.description: Lab Thread Ltd, a life science software company in the UK, has launched its Unified Lab Software Platform globally. This platform integrates molecular biology tools, electronic notebook (ELN) records, and laboratory information management systems (LIMS) to streamline scientific processes. The software aims to facilitate collaboration among research teams, manage data securely, and enhance laboratory workflows to boost biological research.
